summary: Frontend-only regression testing completed for home-page scroll/card fixes in /app/refgd. Revert commit is correctly on top, TypeScript passes, but hard-scroll gating from top still fails and can skip users past the intended paths handoff.

ui_bugs.issue: Desktop hard wheel from top does not consistently trigger the hero->paths controlled transition; run showed scrollY stayed at 0 on first hard wheel, then later skipped to Telegram/footer (scrollY ~3133), bypassing intended one-gesture landing.
Mobile hard scroll can jump deep into lower sections/footer before reliable path-stepper interaction; expected behavior is to complete welcome animation and land at paths first.

integration_issues.flow: Home top -> welcome animation -> choose your path
integration_issues.issue: Gate condition likely misses y=0/top-of-page state because section offset starts below sticky header; nearHero check requires y >= sectionTop-12 (sectionTop observed ~105), so the first hard scroll from absolute top is not intercepted.

action_items: Fix top-of-page interception in CosmicJourney wheel/touch gate so first hard scroll at y=0 always runs controlled animateTo(pathsTop).
Retest mobile hard-swipe from top to ensure it cannot bypass paths and footer is not reached early.
After gate fix, rerun white-overlay visual check specifically at the arrival handoff point.
critical_code_review_comments: CosmicJourney.tsx: nearHero uses y >= bounds.top - 12; with sticky nav/announcement offset, section top is below 0 so the first top-of-page wheel can miss the gate. Include an absolute-top allowance (e.g., y <= threshold) or normalize against section rect.
PathsHorizontalReveal.tsx one-wheel-one-card logic works when wheel events originate over the stepper region; card progression 1->5 is reliable in focused tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified git top commit: 5b04609 (Revert) then fixes below it. npx tsc --noEmit passes. In focused wheel-over-stepper test, cards advance exactly one per wheel (1->5), card 5 visible, and only the next wheel continues page scroll. Core remaining issue is first hard scroll interception from absolute top.
rca of the issue: RCA: CosmicJourney first-scroll gate is position-sensitive and assumes current scrollY has entered the hero section bounds (nearHero). With observed layout, cosmic section starts around y=105 due top UI chrome. At absolute top (y=0), nearHero=false, so the first hard wheel is not prevented/controlled and native scrolling can overshoot intended handoff. Repro: open home at y=0, perform hard wheel; observe no controlled transition then eventual jump near Telegram/footer. Mitigation: widen gate to include y=0/top-of-page and revalidate both wheel and touch paths with the same logic.
